arts.ttl: Liverpool can achieve a modern first by proving Arne Slot’s claim
arts.sum: Before facing Paris Saint-Germain, Slot said Liverpool can’t be referred to as the best team in Europe without winning the Champions League

arts.ttl: For Trent Alexander-Arnold and Andy Robertson, Liverpool’s famous full-back duo, this might be the last dance
arts.sum: After seven years flourishing on opposite sides of the pitch, Liverpool’s hugely successful double act – who face PSG on Wednesday night – could be playing their final Champions League campaign together

arts.ttl: Revealed: Liverpool & Newcastle eyeing €45m star who nearly joined Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United are now among the suitors for the potential transfer of Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: PSG's post-Mbappe era, no 'clans' and foreign stars' French buy-in
arts.sum: Liverpool face a Paris St-Germain side in the Champions League who are hitting their best form of the post-Kylian Mbappe era.

arts.ttl: Newcastle suffer another major Carabao Cup final blow with second player missing vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup later this month, but Eddie Howe's Magpies are going to be without two key players.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Tottenham Pose Serious Threat to PSG’s Pursuit of €80M-Rated Transfer Target
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko caught Paris Saint-Germain’s eye last summer as the club searched for a reliable goal scorer to replace Kylian Mbappe. With Randal Kolo Muani likely heading out this summer, PSG may finally secure a No. 9 who has earned Luis Enrique’s approval. arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele almost changed Liverpool history twice - and could now ruin latest chapter
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele could be going into Wednesday evening's clash in a Liverpool shirt if Jurgen Klopp had his way - but he could also have ruined one of the German's most famous nights

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted XI v PSG: Cody Gakpo a doubt
arts.sum: Cody Gakpo is a doubt to feature for Liverpool when they come up against Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes in the first leg of their Round of 16…

arts.ttl: Liverpool Face Major Challenge from Five PSG Players Who Could Derail Quarterfinal Hopes
arts.sum: Liverpool have been in strong form this season, but after a weekend off, they’ll enter their Champions League first-leg clash with Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes either feeling refreshed or potentially a bit out of sync. arts.ttl: Arne Slot picks Trent replacement and tells Liverpool to make a move
arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong: A like-for-like Alexander-Arnold replacement Liverpool are preparing for life after Trent Alexander-Arnold, who is out of contract in the summer and expected to move to Real Madrid as a free agent.
